name: ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under ICICI Bank reward programme terms
additionalBenefits: Unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge access
Unlimited complimentary airport spa access in India
BOGO movie and event tickets up to four times every month on tickets worth up to Rs 750
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds based on eligible spends in the previous month
4 ICICI Bank Reward Points on every Rs 100 spent on retail transactions except fuel
1 ICICI Bank Reward Point on every Rs 100 spent on utilities and insurance

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank premium card approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank premium card approval criteria
